proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_enzalutamide` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_enzalutamide`, after adjustment for clinical severity and other treatments.

analyses.code: LPM: objective_response ~ treatment_enzalutamide + age_years_z + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + psa_ng_ml_z + gleason_score + other treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear probability coefficient for treatment_enzalutamide was 0.20236 (higher response; p=<1e-250). Raw response was 0.3614 with treatment_enzalutamide=1 versus 0.1589 with treatment_enzalutamide=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_abiraterone` have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_abiraterone`, after adjustment for clinical severity and other treatments.

analyses.code: LPM: objective_response ~ treatment_abiraterone + clinical covariates + other treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear probability coefficient for treatment_abiraterone was -0.00514 (lower response; p=1.914e-1). Raw response was 0.2381 with treatment_abiraterone=1 versus 0.2411 with treatment_abiraterone=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `mcrpc` have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients without `mcrpc`, after adjustment for clinical severity and treatment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `psa_ng_ml` is associated with a lower probability of `objective_response`, after adjustment for clinical severity and treatment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear probability coefficient per 1-SD increase in psa_ng_ml was -0.00952 (lower response; p=4.648e-7).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `brca2_mutation` have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients without `brca2_mutation`, in an additive adjusted model.

analyses.code: LPM: objective_response ~ brca2_mutation + clinical covariates + treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear probability coefficient for brca2_mutation was -0.10178 (lower response; p=<1e-250). Raw response was 0.1497 with brca2_mutation=1 versus 0.2503 with brca2_mutation=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `psma_high` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients without `psma_high`, after adjustment for clinical severity and treatment.

analyses.code: LPM: objective_response ~ psma_high + clinical covariates + treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear probability coefficient for psma_high was -0.00529 (higher response expected; p=1.500e-1). Raw response was 0.2386 with psma_high=1 versus 0.2426 with psma_high=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `visceral_mets` have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients without `visceral_mets`, after adjustment for clinical severity and treatment.

analyses.code: LPM: objective_response ~ visceral_mets + clinical covariates + treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear probability coefficient for visceral_mets was -0.00056 (lower response expected; p=9.015e-1). Raw response was 0.2395 with visceral_mets=1 versus 0.2404 with visceral_mets=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `ldh_u_l` is associated with a lower probability of `objective_response`, after adjustment for clinical severity and treatment.

analyses.code: LPM: objective_response ~ ldh_u_l_z + clinical covariates + treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear probability coefficient per 1-SD increase in ldh_u_l was -0.00071 (lower response expected; p=6.930e-1).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_enzalutamide` and `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `mcrpc` than in patients without `mcrpc`.

analyses.code: Joint LPM: objective_response ~ treatment_enzalutamide * (mcrpc + brca2_mutation + ar_v7_positive + msi_high) + clinical covariates + other treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: In a joint interaction linear probability model, the treatment_enzalutamide:mcrpc interaction coefficient was -0.43056, indicating a smaller enzalutamide-associated response difference in that subgroup (p=<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_enzalutamide` and `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `ar_v7_positive` than in patients without `ar_v7_positive`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `brca2_mutation`, patients receiving `treatment_olaparib` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_olaparib`.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z test: objective_response by treatment_olaparib among brca2_mutation == 1
analyses.result_summary: Among patients with brca2_mutation=1, response was 0.1210 with treatment_olaparib=1 (n=529) versus 0.1531 with treatment_olaparib=0 (n=4467); the difference was -0.03214 (opposite direction to the hypothesis; p=3.409e-2).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `msi_high`, patients receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab`.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z test: objective_response by treatment_pembrolizumab among msi_high == 1
analyses.result_summary: Among patients with msi_high=1, response was 0.1772 with treatment_pembrolizumab=1 (n=79) versus 0.1760 with treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (n=1449); the difference was 0.00123 (higher response expected; p=9.777e-1).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `psma_high`, patients receiving `treatment_lu177_psma` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_lu177_psma`.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z test: objective_response by treatment_lu177_psma among psma_high == 1
analyses.result_summary: Among patients with psma_high=1, response was 0.2376 with treatment_lu177_psma=1 (n=4486) versus 0.2388 with treatment_lu177_psma=0 (n=25476); the difference was -0.00115 (higher response expected; p=8.680e-1).
